name: we-cover-featured-everywhere
description: Resolves Cover block featured images on list views.

scripts.build: npm run build:assets && npm run zip
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:php
scripts.i18n:translate: npm run i18n:normalize && npm run i18n:sync && node scripts/apply-locale-catalog.js
scripts.i18n:json: node scripts/make-json.js && node scripts/json-script-paths.js && node scripts/json-handle-aliases.js
scripts.i18n: npm run build:assets && npm run pot && npm run i18n:po && npm run i18n:translate && npm run i18n:mo && npm run i18n:json && npm run i18n:check

author: webentwicklerin, Gabriele Laesser <hello@webentwicklerin.at>
